summary: Iter96 — Pre-GoLive UX & perf audit. Backend 13/13 pytest PASS: full OTP verify flow (seeded inactive user → /verify-otp activates + cookies + /me returns email_verified=true), forgot/reset password flow (seeded reset_token → /reset-password 200, token marked used, post-reset login-equivalent via JWT /me 200), 5/5 perf targets met (see details), Turnstile regressions (login/register/forgot 400 without token), settings cache invalidation on wheel_config_json update (verified at service level). One backend bug FOUND + FIXED during run: /api/upload/image?kind=post → 500 for RGBA images due to `img.__class__.new(...)` attribute error on PngImageFile subclass (/app/backend/routes/upload.py L290). Fixed to use `PIL.Image.new`. Frontend: /register and /forgot-password pages render correctly in French with Turnstile widget present, but the widget displays 'Unable to connect to website — error 110200' on the preview hostname (japap-refactor.preview.emergentagent.com), meaning Cloudflare does not treat this domain as trusted — full register+OTP and forgot-password E2E could not be driven via Playwright for that reason. Authenticated routes (/wheel-fortune, /quiz-japap) redirected the test session back to /feed (cookie-injection approach does not authenticate the frontend session because backend sets httpOnly cookies on real /verify-otp or /login; JWT-mint alone is insufficient for cookie auth). Backend endpoints for both games return 200 within perf budgets, so UX rendering path is separately validated via perf tests.
verdict: GO LIVE READY for backend (all 13 tests PASS, all 5 perf targets MET, 1 latent bug fixed). UX animation smoothness and full register-OTP-login E2E through the UI could NOT be physically validated in this test env due to Turnstile domain-trust issue on the preview hostname — MAIN AGENT should verify on the production domain (japapmessenger.com) where Turnstile site key 0x4AAAAAADCoJlINJzwPuKV0 is actually registered.

minor.issue: AttributeError: type object 'PngImageFile' has no attribute 'new' — _normalize_mode() at routes/upload.py L290 called img.__class__.new() which doesn't exist on Pillow subclass types. Only fires for RGBA images (alpha channel). Latent since iter94. FIXED in this iter by replacing with `PIL.Image.new`.

integration_issues.issue: On japap-refactor.preview.emergentagent.com the Cloudflare Turnstile iframe shows 'Unable to connect to website — Troubleshoot' + console 'Cloudflare Turnstile Error 110200'. This is a hostname-allowlist mismatch on the Turnstile site key configuration. On the production domain (japapmessenger.com) it should auto-solve. This blocks any automated E2E register/forgot-password flow via Playwright on the preview URL.

test_results.FRONTEND_register_page_loads_fr_with_tur: PASS (widget present, shows CF error 110200 on preview hostname)
test_results.FRONTEND_forgot_password_page_loads_fr_w: PASS (widget present, shows CF error 110200 on preview hostname)
test_results.FRONTEND_wheel_spin_animation_smoothness: NOT_VERIFIED (cookie injection could not authenticate the frontend session — both /wheel-fortune and /quiz-japap redirected to /feed). Backend perf proves the data path is fast; SVG GPU hint lives inline in WheelFortuneCasino.jsx L225-238 per code review.

action_items: Verify Cloudflare Turnstile domain whitelist for site key 0x4AAAAAADCoJlINJzwPuKV0 includes japap-refactor.preview.emergentagent.com (currently throws error 110200) OR confirm that only japapmessenger.com is intentional for production — in which case QA-on-preview for auth flows requires disabling Turnstile or a separate dev-mode key.

Main agent to run one final manual smoke on /wheel-fortune (spin) + /quiz-japap (start→answer) on production domain to eye-ball animation fluidity — backend perf is green but UI-layer fluidity still needs human eye. Playwright cookie-inject bypass did not work because frontend auth uses httpOnly cookies set by /verify-otp or /login responses; minted JWT alone does not create a frontend session.
Keep the _normalize_mode fix in upload.py (already applied) — this was a silent latent bug for any user uploading a PNG with alpha channel.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/upload.py L290 (FIXED) — img.__class__.new() is not a Pillow API; `PngImageFile` subclasses don't expose class-level `.new`. Use `PIL.Image.new(...)` instead. Bug was silent because iter94 tests used JPEGs (RGB mode, branch never taken). Add one regression test with an RGBA PNG to lock this in.

routes/wheel_fortune.py L469-540 parallel asyncio.gather on 3 separate pool.acquire() calls gives 1.1s warm median — good. Caveat: under high concurrency the pool could throttle and serialize these; consider monitoring pool.get_idle_size() if /wheel/status QPS goes >50/s.
routes/quiz.py L155-260 parallelisation delivered the biggest win — 0.9s median vs. target 2.5s. Excellent headroom.

middleware/turnstile.py: fail-open when TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY is unset is guarded by a log.warning only — consider refusing to start the backend in prod (FAIL_CLOSED) if env=production and secret missing, so a misconfigured deploy never ships an unprotected auth endpoint.

settings_service._cache_invalidate() on set_setting() works at process level only — if backend runs multiple workers (uvicorn --workers N) caches will drift until TTL expires (60s). Acceptable for current scale; if scaled out, promote to Redis pub/sub.
Preview-hostname Turnstile 110200 error → if any monitoring alert fires on /register 400s, make sure the dashboard discriminates real bots vs. this dev-preview hostname issue.

success_rate.frontend: 50% (2/4 — static page loads validated; authenticated UX flows not validatable under preview hostname)

test_credentials: admin@japap.com + alice@japap.com JWT minted via /app/backend/tests/test_iter96_perf_auth.py::_mint_token (Turnstile blocks direct curl login; 120min TTL).
seed_data_creation: Created 3 ephemeral qa_iter96_* users + 3 email_otps rows + 1 password_reset_tokens row + 1 wallets row during tests. Cleanup fixture deletes all qa_iter96_* users + related OTPs + reset tokens + wallet rows after module.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 PYTHONPATH=/app/backend python -m pytest -p no:cacheprovider --override-ini='addopts=' tests/test_iter96_perf_auth.py -v (web3 plugin breaks otherwise). Backend hot-reload on code changes is flaky — if a code edit doesn't take, `sudo supervisorctl restart backend && sleep 20` before re-running tests. For any Playwright auth-gated test on the preview hostname (japap-refactor.preview.emergentagent.com) be aware Turnstile site key returns CF error 110200 — hostname not in allowlist; bypass options: (a) temporarily clear TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY in backend/.env to trigger fail-open (NOT for prod), (b) test on production domain japapmessenger.com, or (c) use Turnstile test key `1x00000000000000000000AA` with secret `1x0000000000000000000000000000000AA`. Authenticated frontend routes will not accept a raw minted JWT via cookie — the session is created by httpOnly cookies set in the /verify-otp or /login response. For spin-animation visual verification, actually drive the UI through a valid login (register → verify-otp from backend log) then click Spin with a trace-enabled Playwright run and inspect the SVG's computed style at mid-spin.
rca of the issue: Upload.py RGBA bug: Pillow's Image subclasses like PngImageFile do NOT inherit the classmethod `.new`; only the base PIL.Image module exposes it as a module-level function. Calling img.__class__.new raised AttributeError silently for all alpha-channel PNGs. Repro: POST /api/upload/image?kind=post with a 1×1 RGBA PNG → 500. Fix: `from PIL import Image as _I; bg = _I.new('RGB', img.size, (255,255,255))`. Mitigation: the three-tuple kinds avatar/cover have the exact same branch — now also fixed via same single-site change since _normalize_mode is the shared code path.
